meaning: Universal Product Code 通用产品代码 [军] Unit Production Costs,单件生产成本
examples: The marketing lead provides the UPC symbol for the product.
A UPC number consists of a Company Prefix and a Product number.
There are human readable digits below the UPC code and above the supplemental code.
Two decades later Woodland went on to help devise the UPC system in universal use today.
"UPC is going to keep attacking just as it has been, " promises Mark Schneider.
